description: Contains legal status events throughout a patent's lifecycle, including grants, lapses, transfers, and fee payments from INPADOC legal status data.

columns.name: event_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the legal event record.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the patent application.

columns.name: event_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequential number ordering events for the same application.

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Type of legal event (e.g., grant, lapse, transfer, fee payment).

columns.name: event_auth
columns.description: Patent authority reporting the legal event.

columns.name: event_code
columns.description: Authority-specific code identifying the type of legal event.

columns.name: event_filing_date
columns.description: Date when the event-related document was filed.

columns.name: event_publn_date
columns.description: Date when the legal event was published.

columns.name: event_effective_date
columns.description: Date when the legal event became effective.

columns.name: event_text
columns.description: Descriptive text providing details about the legal event.

columns.name: ref_doc_auth
columns.description: Authority of the referenced document related to the event.

columns.name: ref_doc_nr
columns.description: Number of the referenced document related to the event.

columns.name: ref_doc_kind
columns.description: Kind code of the referenced document.

columns.name: ref_doc_date
columns.description: Date of the referenced document.

columns.name: ref_doc_text
columns.description: Additional text information about the referenced document.

columns.name: party_type
columns.description: Type of party involved in the event (e.g., applicant, owner, licensee).

columns.name: party_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequential number for multiple parties involved in the same event.

columns.name: party_new
columns.description: Name of the new party after an ownership or rights transfer.

columns.name: party_old
columns.description: Name of the previous party before an ownership or rights transfer.

columns.name: spc_nr
columns.description: Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) number for pharmaceutical/plant protection patents.

columns.name: spc_filing_date
columns.description: Filing date of the Supplementary Protection Certificate.

columns.name: spc_patent_expiry_date
columns.description: Original expiry date of the basic patent before SPC extension.

columns.name: spc_extension_date
columns.description: Extended expiry date after granting the Supplementary Protection Certificate.

columns.name: spc_text
columns.description: Additional text information about the Supplementary Protection Certificate.

columns.name: designated_states
columns.description: List of countries/states designated for patent protection (relevant for PCT/EP applications).

columns.name: extension_states
columns.description: List of extension states for European patent applications.

columns.name: fee_country
columns.description: Country for which the maintenance fee was paid.

columns.name: fee_payment_date
columns.description: Date when the maintenance or renewal fee was paid.

columns.name: fee_renewal_year
columns.description: Year of patent protection for which the renewal fee applies.

columns.name: fee_text
columns.description: Additional text information about the fee payment.

columns.name: lapse_country
columns.description: Country where the patent rights lapsed.

columns.name: lapse_date
columns.description: Date when the patent rights lapsed or expired.

columns.name: lapse_text
columns.description: Additional text information about the lapse event.

columns.name: reinstate_country
columns.description: Country where the patent rights were reinstated.

columns.name: reinstate_date
columns.description: Date when the patent rights were reinstated after lapse.

columns.name: reinstate_text
columns.description: Additional text information about the reinstatement event.

columns.name: class_scheme
columns.description: Classification scheme referenced in the legal event (e.g., IPC, CPC).

columns.name: class_symbol
columns.description: Classification code symbol referenced in the legal event.
